app.title: Dingovault
app.emptyTitle: This page is waiting for your ideas
app.emptySubtitle: Open another note from the palette, or create blocks on this page — every bullet is a first-class outline node.
app.emptyCtaBody: Press Ctrl+K (⌘K) to jump anywhere instantly.
app.hint: Ctrl+K palette · Tab / Shift+Tab indent · Cmd+Enter TODO cycle · / commands · Enter at end adds sibling · drag ⠿ to reorder · fold ▾ · checkboxes multi-select · mobile: swipe ← delete · → TODO
app.aboutBody: Local-first outliner with Markdown blocks, FTS search, and optional cloud sync. See the repository README for setup, SaaS mode, and security notes.
app.healthResetConfirm: Clear the local search database and rebuild from Markdown on disk? Your .md files will not be deleted.
app.healthResetDone: Local index rebuilt from vault files.
app.blockRecovered: Document refreshed after the index changed.

mindmap.empty: No outline blocks on this page
mindmap.labelsHidden: zoom in to show more labels

settings.localAccountHint: Local-first mode. Sign-in can unlock sync, teams, and commercial features later.
settings.commercialHint: Commercial use can be supported with an activated license while keeping the core open source.
settings.fontDensityHint: Obsidian-like 13px system UI, compact icons, and dense file rows.
settings.aiPanelHint: Provider and model controls live in the AI Chat panel for now.
settings.openSourceHint: The local knowledge base remains open and inspectable.
settings.catalystHint: A one-time supporter license for early features and commercial-friendly builds.
settings.teamPlanHint: Future paid plan: team vaults, hosted sync, admin controls, and enterprise support.
settings.healthHint: Clear the local search database and rebuild it from Markdown files.
settings.comingSoon: This section is reserved for the next product pass.

console.title: Glyph Console
console.placeholder: Run a command in this vault…
console.guardrail: Block text is data, not trusted code. Dingovault only runs commands after an explicit click and confirmation for non-read-only commands.
console.waveMissing: Wave is not installed or no Wave launcher was found.

terminal.confirmRun:
Run this command and append its terminal output under the block?

{command}

palette.placeholder: Jump to page or search blocks…
palette.emptyRecents: Open a page to build history — recents appear here.
palette.emptySearchHint: Try a shorter keyword, check spelling, or open a page from recents (clear the search box).

backlinks.title: Linked references
backlinks.empty: No other pages link here yet.
backlinks.emptyHint: When another note links to this page with [[wikilinks]], those references show up here.

runHistory.title: Run history
runHistory.subtitle: Queryable terminal results written back into notes.
runHistory.emptyHint: Run a block as a command to append a queryable result here.
runHistory.emptyFailedHint: Failures across the vault will appear here.

semantic.title: Related blocks
semantic.empty: No strong semantic matches on other pages yet. Index embeddings and try again.

outline.aiPlaceholder: e.g. Summarize this bullet, fix grammar, translate to Japanese…
outline.aiConnectionLost: Connection lost — check that your AI server is running, then try again.

aiChat.title: AI Chat
aiChat.ragHint: Uses this page plus similar blocks across the vault (current: {path})
aiChat.emptyHint: Uses the current page plus semantically related blocks.
aiChat.systemPromptPlaceholder: Instructions for the assistant when answering with vault context…
aiChat.placeholder: Ask about this page… (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline)
aiChat.disableEmbeddings: Disable background embeddings (lighter on CPU / GPU)
